story-bg.query: Velmora was born from a simple belief: jewelry should feel personal, not precious. Each piece is designed in-house and finished in 18k gold plate to bring a touch of everyday luxury to your collection—without the traditional markup. Designed for the Modern Muse fine jewelry craftsmanship
